description: Animal must be in empty stage.
Last animal event must be a total weaning (animal_weaning) or an abortion (animal_loss_rpr).
conditions: verifica o evento mais recente na lista de todos os eventos do animal ordenados por data

description: Last animal event date must be equal to the animal's current stage date.
conditions: compara a data do último evento (ordenado desc) com animalData.date
retorna falso se não houver evento registrado

description: The event date must match the animal's registration date.
conditions: compara animalData.date com data.date ignorando hora (apenas UTC day/month/year)
retorna falso se as datas não coincidirem

description: Cannot delete animal nurse mother if subsequent events exist.
